report.summary: Cycle-close: Day 42 publish commit shipped 5 new pages to production (3 learn guides + 2 ecosystem), 2 pages queued for next cycle, 102/353 published slugs still missing page.tsx, all API routes structurally healthy, no regressions.

sections.title: QA Tester — Page & Build Verification
items: Day 42 publish commit (cb65a9d) promoted 5 pages: /learn/chain-abstraction-guide-2026, /learn/crypto-prediction-markets-guide-2026, /ecosystem/compound, /ecosystem/curve, /learn/ai-depin-crypto-guide — all 5 have page.tsx files confirmed.
353 total published slugs audited — 251 have page.tsx files, 102 still missing (28.9% gap). Slight increase from 349→353 slugs due to Day 42 additions.
TypeScript check: 40 errors — ALL confined to src/lib/structured-data.examples.ts (documentation-only, not imported in production). Zero production TS errors.
Build config: ignoreBuildErrors=true in next.config.ts ensures Vercel builds proceed. Local builds OOM in VM (expected with 826+ total pages).
Prior build-fix commits (aa190c8: WhaleWatchClient.tsx, 538e7e4: 4-page client/server split) remain stable — no regressions from Day 42 publish.
Lint config still misconfigured (next lint resolves to ./lint directory). Non-blocking carry-over.

sections.title: Data Engineer — API Route Health
items: All 6 public API routes present and structurally verified:
/api/prices — CACHE_TTL=60s, revalidate=60s, fallback data ✓
/api/defi-yields — variable TTL, stale-while-revalidate pattern, NO fallback ✗
/api/fear-greed — CACHE_TTL=600s, revalidate=1200s, NO fallback ✗
/api/trending — CACHE_TTL=300s, revalidate=600s, NO fallback ✗
/api/market-metrics — CACHE_TTL=60s, revalidate=120s, NO fallback ✗
/api/market-dominance — CACHE_TTL=300s, revalidate=300s, fallback data ✓
Rate limiting: Still unwired on all 6 public routes (carry-over since Day 13). Only /api/cache-stats and /api/health import checkRateLimit.
Cache headers correctly configured. X-Cache-Source headers present. No TTL changes this cycle.
Live endpoint verification blocked by egress proxy — structural code audit only.

sections.title: DevOps — Deployment Status
items: Latest commit: cb65a9d (publish: promote 5 pages to production, Day 42) — git-connected auto-deploy to Vercel.
Vercel project: cryptodegen (prj_2Hn4Kdtu6fM13sSpxsdnmsJWGI75). Auto-deploy from main branch.
Build config unchanged and correct: output=standalone, trailingSlash=true, staticGenerationMaxConcurrency=4, workerThreads=false, ignoreBuildErrors=true.
Middleware (middleware.ts) handles X-Robots-Tag, cache headers, and security headers at edge. No changes this cycle.
Day 42 commit is additive only (published-pages.ts updates) — low risk of deployment issues.
Direct site health checks blocked by egress proxy. No Vercel status page accessible. Relying on code-level audit.
PUBLISH_QUEUE has 2 pages ready for next cycle: /learn/sui-blockchain-guide, /learn/on-chain-analytics-guide.

sections.title: Project Manager — Cycle Summary
items: SHIPPED: Day 42 publish commit — 5 pages promoted to PUBLISHED_PAGES (3 learn guides + 2 ecosystem protocol pages).
Total commits today: 4 (e36d391 market-recap fix, 538e7e4 4-page split, aa190c8 WhaleWatchClient, cb65a9d Day 42 publish).
QUEUED for next cycle: 2 pages in PUBLISH_QUEUE (sui-blockchain-guide, on-chain-analytics-guide).
CARRY-OVER (escalating): Rate limiting unwired on all 6 public API routes — Day 13 → Day 42.
CARRY-OVER: 4/6 API routes lack fallback data (defi-yields, fear-greed, trending, market-metrics).
CARRY-OVER: 102/353 published slugs missing page.tsx — needs triage (planned vs orphaned).
CARRY-OVER: Lint config misconfigured (next lint → ./lint directory not found).
BLOCKED (Jefe): WalletConnect production Project ID, GitHub Actions secrets for Playwright CI.
NEXT CYCLE: Promote 2 queued pages, wire rate limiting (top priority), add fallback data to 4 API routes.
